implementation_summary: Updated knowledge base search to use contains/substring matching across topic, title, and content by changing the search pattern from prefix-only to wildcard-on-both-sides. Added focused service tests to verify mid-field matches are returned and prefix matches still work under the broader search behavior.
commit_message: Fix knowledge search to match substrings in article fields

changes.change_summary: Switch search from prefix-only LIKE pattern to contains-style ILIKE pattern across topic, title, and content.
changes.rationale: This is the smallest targeted fix for the reported search bug and preserves the existing API and result shape.

changes.change_summary: Add regression coverage for mid-string matches in content, title, and topic, while keeping a prefix-match assertion.
changes.rationale: These tests lock in the broadened contains semantics and protect against future regressions to prefix-only behavior.

validation_notes: Focused service tests should cover mid-field contains matches and prefix matches.
No API contract or response shape changes were made.
assumptions: The service layer is the only place implementing knowledge search filtering.
The existing test file is intended to remain a lightweight service-level test module.
